description: Create an Expo Application for Nx.

examples.description: Use class components instead of functional components

directory.description: The directory of the new application.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the application in?

displayName.description: The display name to show in the application. Defaults to name.

linter.description: The tool to use for running lint checks.
linter.x-prompt: Which linter would you like to use?

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests
unitTestRunner.x-prompt: Which unit test runner would you like to use?

tags.description: Add tags to the application (used for linting)

js.description: Generate JavaScript files rather than TypeScript files

enableTypedLinting.description: Whether to enable typed linting. For flat configs, this configures the recommended `parserOptions.projectService` and `tsconfigRootDir`. For legacy `.eslintrc` configs, this configures `parserOptions.project`. We do not enable this by default for lint performance reasons.

setParserOptionsProject.description: Whether to enable typed linting. For flat configs, this configures the recommended `parserOptions.projectService` and `tsconfigRootDir`. For legacy `.eslintrc` configs, this configures `parserOptions.project`. We do not enable this by default for lint performance reasons.
setParserOptionsProject.x-deprecated: Use `enableTypedLinting` instead. This option will be removed in Nx v24.

e2eTestRunner.description: Adds the specified e2e test runner

useProjectJson.description: Use a `project.json` configuration file instead of inlining the Nx configuration in the `package.json` file.
